name: GLSL Advanced POP
description: '''Refer to the [[Write GLSL POPs]] article for more info on using this POP.''' In single shader dispatch mode, runs a single compute shader that can read and write to points, verts, and primitive attributes simultaneously. In per primitive batch mode, runs the shader once per primitive batch. The number of threads mode defines how many threads are used.

parameters.name: Compute Shader
parameters.label: Compute Shader
parameters.description: Points to the DAT holding the Compute Shader. Drag & Drop a DAT here, or manually enter the path to the DAT.

parameters.name: Shader Dispatch Mode
parameters.label: Shader Dispatch Mode
parameters.description: Specifies the compute shader dispatch mode.

parameters.name: Number of Elements
parameters.label: Number of Elements
parameters.description: The number of elements when setting it manually with a parameter.

parameters.name: POP
parameters.label: POP
parameters.description: POP reference when setting the number of elements from an attribute.

parameters.name: Num Elements Attrib
parameters.label: Num Elements Attrib
parameters.description: Sets the attribute class where the number of elements can be found.

parameters.name: Work Group Size
parameters.label: Work Group Size
parameters.description: Specifies the workgroup size when manually setting the number of threads.

parameters.name: Dispatch Size
parameters.label: Dispatch Size
parameters.description: Determines the number of thread groups to launch in each dimension.

parameters.name: Number of Threads per Batch Mode
parameters.label: Number of Threads per Batch Mode
parameters.description: Sets how the number of threads per primitive batch is determined.

parameters.name: Point Output Attributes
parameters.label: Point Output Attributes
parameters.description: Input point attributes modified by the shader.

parameters.name: Prim Output Attributes
parameters.label: Prim Output Attributes
parameters.description: Input primitive attributes modified by the shader.

parameters.name: Vert Output Attributes
parameters.label: Vert Output Attributes
parameters.description: The vertex attributes to output.

parameters.name: Output Access
parameters.label: Output Access
parameters.description: Controls whether the attribute buffers can only be read from or read from and written to.

parameters.name: Initialize Output Attributes
parameters.label: Initialize Output Attributes
parameters.description: Copy input attributes values for existing attributes, set the attributes values to their defaults for new attributes. It's a separate compute shader dispatch happening before the POP custom compute shader dispatch.

parameters.name: Copy Previous Pass Output to Input
parameters.label: Copy Previous Pass Output to Input
parameters.description: Enable copying the previous pass outputs to the next pass inputs.

parameters.name: Passes
parameters.label: Passes
parameters.description: Number of shader passes.

parameters.name: Input
parameters.label: Input
parameters.description: Start of Sequential Parameter Blocks managing the inputs of the POP.

parameters.name: TDSimplexNoise()
parameters.label: TDSimplexNoise()
parameters.description: Sets the implementation to use for a simplex noise method that can be called in the shader.

parameters.name: Number of Threads
parameters.label: Number of Threads
parameters.description: Selects how to set the number of threads for the custom compute shader dispatch.

parameters.name: Render
parameters.label: Render
parameters.description: Enables rendering in the viewer. Disable when output data is in an intermediate or non-renderable state

parameters.name: Max Points
parameters.label: Max Points
parameters.description: Determines if the maximum number of points is determined by the input or by a custom value.

parameters.name: Point Count Info
parameters.label: Point Count Info
parameters.description: Input point count source.

parameters.name: Point Count
parameters.label: Point Count
parameters.description: Output point count source.

parameters.name: Point Count POP
parameters.label: Point Count POP
parameters.description: POP that holds the point count.

parameters.name: Point Count Attribute
parameters.label: Point Count Attribute
parameters.description: Attribute class of the attribute that holds the point count.

parameters.name: Max Triangles
parameters.label: Max Triangles
parameters.description: Specifies how to set the max number of triangle primitives. If the POP topology info is on the CPU, that's the actual number of triangle primitives.

parameters.name: Max Quads
parameters.label: Max Quads
parameters.description: Specifies how to set the max number of quadrilaterals primitives. If the POP topology info is on the CPU, that's the actual number of quadrilateral primitives.

parameters.name: Max Line Strips
parameters.label: Max Line Strips
parameters.description: Specifies how to set the maximum number of line strips.

parameters.name: Max Line Strip Verts
parameters.label: Max Line Strip Verts
parameters.description: Sets the max number of line strip vertices. If the POP topology is on the CPU, that's the actual number of line strip vertices.

parameters.name: Max Lines
parameters.label: Max Lines
parameters.description: Specifies how to set the maximum number of line primitives.

parameters.name: Max Point Prims
parameters.label: Max Point Prims
parameters.description: Specifies how to set the max number of point primitives.

parameters.name: Line Strip Info Update
parameters.label: Line Strip Info Update
parameters.description: Allows you to choose how the Line Strip Info buffers get updated.

parameters.name: Line Strip Info POP
parameters.label: Line Strip Info POP
parameters.description: POP with the attribute to use for the Line Strip Info buffer.

parameters.name: Line Strip Info Attribute
parameters.label: Line Strip Info Attribute
parameters.description: Sets the attribute class where the line strip info attribute can be found.

parameters.name: Line Strip Index per Vert POP
parameters.label: Line Strip Index per Vert POP
parameters.description: POP with the attribute to use for the Line Strip Index per Vert buffer.

parameters.name: Line Strip Index per Vert Attribute
parameters.label: Line Strip Index per Vert Attribute
parameters.description: Sets the attribute class where the line strip index per vertex attribute can be found.
menuLabels: Line Strip Index per Vert Attribute
Line Strip Index per Vert Attrib

parameters.name: Max Verts per Line Strip
parameters.label: Max Verts per Line Strip
parameters.description: Specifies you want to set the max number of verts per line strip.allocation.

parameters.name: Initialize Output Primitives
parameters.label: Initialize Output Primitives
parameters.description: Copy input primitives (point index values) and set point index for new primitives to 0.

parameters.name: Topology Info
parameters.label: Topology Info
parameters.description: Sets the topology information source.

parameters.name: Topology Info POP
parameters.label: Topology Info POP
parameters.description: Sets reference to a POP where the info attribute can be found.

parameters.name: Topology Info Attributes Class
parameters.label: Topology Info Attributes Class
parameters.description: Sets the attribute class where the info attribute can be found.

parameters.name: Triangle Count
parameters.label: Triangle Count
parameters.description: The triangle count when setting it manually with a parameter.

parameters.name: Quad Count
parameters.label: Quad Count
parameters.description: Whether to get the count of quad primitives from the source, set it to 0, or set its value manually.

parameters.name: Line Strip Count
parameters.label: Line Strip Count
parameters.description: Whether to get the count of line strips from the source, set it to 0, or set its value manually.

parameters.name: Line Strip Vert Count
parameters.label: Line Strip Vert Count
parameters.description: Whether to get the vertex count of line strips from the source, set it to 0, or set its value manually.

parameters.name: Line Count
parameters.label: Line Count
parameters.description: Whether to get the count of line primitives from the source, set it to 0, or set its value manually.

parameters.name: Point Prim Count
parameters.label: Point Prim Count
parameters.description: Whether to get the count of point primitives from the source, set it to 0, or set its value manually.

parameters.name: Extra Output
parameters.label: Extra Output
parameters.description: Start of Sequential Parameter Blocks to declare additional POP outputs that can be picked with GLSL Select.

parameters.name: New Attribute
parameters.label: New Attribute
parameters.description: Start of Sequential Parameter Blocks to create new attributes.

parameters.name: Matrix Attribute
parameters.label: Matrix Attribute
parameters.description: Start of Sequential Parameter Blocks to create new matrix attributes.

parameters.name: Pre-Multiply RGB by Alpha
parameters.label: Pre-Multiply RGB by Alpha
parameters.description: Enable RGB values pre-multiplication with the Alpha.

parameters.name: Color
parameters.label: Color
parameters.description: Start of Sequential Parameter Blocks for color uniforms.

parameters.name: Vector
parameters.label: Vector
parameters.description: Start of Sequential Parameter Blocks to define uniform variables.

parameters.name: Sampler
parameters.label: Sampler
parameters.description: Start of Sequential Parameter Blocks for Samplers to read from the shader.

parameters.name: Array
parameters.label: Array
parameters.description: Start of Sequential Parameter Blocks for array uniforms.

parameters.name: Matrix
parameters.label: Matrix
parameters.description: Start of Sequential Parameter Blocks of matrix uniforms.

parameters.name: Temp Buffer
parameters.label: Temp Buffer
parameters.description: Start of Sequential Parameter Blocks for Temporary buffers used to pass information to the shader as uniforms.
